recipes.title: Greek Salad
steps: Wash and chop the tomatoes into wedges.
Peel and slice the cucumber into half-moons.
Thinly slice the red onion into rings.
Core and slice the bell pepper into strips.
Combine all vegetables in a large bowl.
Squeeze fresh lemon juice over the salad.
Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle salt and oregano.
Toss gently and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Banana Pancakes
steps: Peel the bananas and mash them thoroughly in a bowl.
Crack the eggs into the mashed bananas and whisk until smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat with a bit of butter.
Pour small circles of batter onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes until bubbles form on the surface.
Flip carefully and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
Serve with honey, maple syrup, or fresh fruit.

recipes.title: Classic Veggie Omelette
steps: Crack eggs into a bowl and whisk with salt and pepper.
Dice the bell pepper, onion, and tomato into small pieces.
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour in the egg mixture, tilting the pan to spread evenly.
Scatter the diced vegetables over one half of the omelette.
When the edges set, fold the omelette in half.
Cook for another 30 seconds and slide onto a plate.

recipes.title: Carrot & Ginger Soup
steps: Peel and roughly chop the carrots, onion, and potato.
Sauté the onion in olive oil until translucent (5 minutes).
Add the carrots and potato, stir for 2 minutes.
Pour in 750ml vegetable stock and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes until tender.
Blend until smooth using an immersion blender.
Add lemon juice, season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot with a swirl of cream and crusty bread.

recipes.title: Stuffed Bell Peppers
steps: Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F).
Cut the tops off the bell peppers, remove seeds.
Dice the onion, carrot, and tomatoes.
Cook rice according to package directions.
Sauté onion and carrot until softened (5 minutes).
Mix sautéed veggies with cooked rice and diced tomatoes.
Season with salt, pepper, and herbs.
Stuff each pepper, place in a baking dish.
Bake for 25 minutes until peppers are tender.

recipes.title: Potato & Onion Frittata
steps: Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
Slice the onion and dice the bell pepper.
Fry potato slices in olive oil until golden (10 minutes).
Add onion and bell pepper, cook for 5 more minutes.
Beat the eggs with salt and pepper.
Pour eggs over the vegetables in the pan.
Cook on low heat for 8 minutes until almost set.
Finish under the broiler for 2-3 minutes until golden on top.
Let rest 5 minutes, then slice into wedges.

recipes.title: Fresh Tomato Bruschetta
steps: Dice the tomatoes into small cubes.
Finely chop the red onion.
Combine tomatoes, onion, fresh basil in a bowl.
Add lemon juice, olive oil, salt and pepper.
Let marinate for 10 minutes.
Toast thick bread slices until golden.
Rub garlic clove on warm toast.
Spoon the tomato mixture on top and serve.

recipes.title: Cool Cucumber Gazpacho
steps: Roughly chop cucumber, tomato, bell pepper, and onion.
Add all vegetables to a blender.
Add lemon juice, olive oil, and a splash of vinegar.
Blend until smooth (or leave slightly chunky).
Season with salt, pepper, and cumin.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to chill.
Serve cold, garnished with diced cucumber and a drizzle of olive oil.

recipes.title: Quick Egg Fried Rice
steps: Cook rice and let it cool (day-old rice works best).
Dice carrot, onion, and bell pepper into small cubes.
Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
Scramble the eggs, then push them to the side.
Stir-fry the vegetables for 3 minutes.
Add the cold rice and toss everything together.
Season with soy sauce and sesame oil.
Stir-fry for 2 more minutes until rice is heated through.

recipes.title: Lemon Roasted Potatoes
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Peel and cut potatoes into wedges.
Quarter the onion.
Toss potatoes and onion with olive oil, lemon juice, and zest.
Season generously with salt, pepper, and oregano.
Spread in a single layer on a baking tray.
Roast for 35-40 minutes, turning halfway.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs.

recipes.title: Fresh Tomato Salsa
steps: Finely dice the tomatoes, onion, bell pepper, and cucumber.
Combine all diced vegetables in a bowl.
Squeeze in fresh lemon juice.
Add a pinch of salt, pepper, and cumin.
Mix well and let rest for 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve with tortilla chips or as a side.

recipes.title: Banana Smoothie Bowl
steps: Slice bananas and freeze overnight.
Blend frozen bananas with a splash of milk until thick and creamy.
Pour into a bowl.
Thinly slice the extra banana for topping.
Add sliced banana, granola, and a drizzle of honey on top.
Sprinkle with chia seeds or shredded coconut.
Serve immediately before it melts.

recipes.title: Creamy Potato Soup
steps: Peel and dice the potatoes, onion, and carrots.
Sauté the onion in butter until golden (5 minutes).
Add potatoes and carrots, cook for 3 minutes.
Pour in 1L vegetable stock and bring to a boil.
Simmer for 20 minutes until potatoes are fork-tender.
Blend half the soup for a chunky texture (or all for smooth).
Stir in cream, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Serve topped with chives and croutons.
